# Review and Fix Test Code Issues

Follow the steps below to review and fix issues in the test code:

1. Review test results and decide whether the problems lie on the codebase or test codes
    2. If it can't be decided, stop there and just raise questions to me.
2. If no questions left (all raised questions are solved by my answers), decide whether the problems lie on the codebase or test codes
3. If the problems lie on the test codes, fix them. If the problems lie on the codebase, raise Github issues to me.
